title: The Matrix
overview: A computer hacker discovers the world is a simulation and joins a rebellion against intelligent machines.

title: Inception
overview: A skilled thief enters layered dreams to plant an idea inside a target's mind.

title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travels through a wormhole in search of humanity's next home.

title: The Martian
overview: An astronaut stranded on Mars uses science and resilience to survive until rescue.

title: Gravity
overview: Two astronauts fight to survive after debris destroys their shuttle in orbit.

title: Blade Runner 2049
overview: A young blade runner uncovers a mystery that threatens the fragile balance of society.

title: Arrival
overview: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien visitors and understand their purpose.

title: Tenet
overview: A secret agent manipulates time inversion to stop a global catastrophe.

title: Passengers
overview: Two passengers wake up early on a long interstellar voyage and must face isolation together.

title: Oblivion
overview: A repair technician on a devastated Earth begins to question his mission and identity.
